title: NBA Finals Four Heroes Illustration Poster AI Prompt
sourceTitle: NBA Finals Four Heroes Illustration Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Explosive New York Knicks NBA Finals 2026 collectible illustration poster built around Jalen Brunson number 11, OG Anunoby number 8, Karl-Anthony Towns number 32, and Jose Alvarado number 0 in authentic New York Knicks uniforms. Subject: Jalen Brunson number 11, OG Anunoby number 8, Karl-Anthony Towns number 32, and Jose Alvarado number 0 in authentic New York Knicks uniforms forms the four-hero hierarchy: Brunson largest as floor general, OG near the rim, Towns as frontcourt anchor, and Jose as lower-foreground energy catalyst. Scene: Madison Square Garden and the New York skyline behind them with basketball court perspective below with orange and royal-blue paint splashes, court energy, crowd atmosphere, and New York playoff identity integrated behind the players. Composition: Vertical 4:5 poster: giant Brunson portrait anchors center, OG action figure near rim, Towns roaring or rebounding, Jose lower foreground, skyline and Garden behind, basketball court perspective below, and clean room for callouts. Signature Elements: Preserved nba finals knicks four heroes collectible illustration poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Premium collectible basketball art with explosive ink strokes, watercolor bursts, painterly sports illustration, realistic recognizable faces, dynamic action layering, and polished Finals poster finish. Color Palette: Knicks orange and royal blue paint, white and blue uniforms, dark city contrast, warm arena highlights, black ink accents, and high-energy collectible poster color. Lighting: Dramatic sports poster rim light, painted splash highlights, arena glow, strong portrait separation, and energetic contrast around each player layer. Typography: KNICKS IN 5 / NEW YORK NEVER QUIT / 29 POINT COMEBACK / 3-1 SERIES LEAD / ONE WIN FROM '73 / NBA FINALS 2026 GAME 4 appears as big title, secondary line, comeback callouts, series badge, and small NBA Finals 2026 Game 4 text. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
